description_long: This is a ceiling-mounted sconce featuring three large, drum-shaped lampshades arranged in a triangular configuration. The shades are made of a light, opaque material, likely fabric or frosted glass, and are supported by elegantly curved metallic arms with a polished chrome or nickel finish. Each arm ends in a teardrop-shaped decorative finial, adding a touch of sophistication. The fixture is suspended from a chain and canopy, both matching the metallic finish of the arms. The overall design is balanced and symmetrical, with a blend of modern and classic elements. The sconce is designed to provide ambient lighting and serve as a decorative centerpiece in an urban interior setting.
description: A ceiling-mounted sconce with three drum-shaped shades on curved metallic arms, suspended by a matching chain and canopy. The fixture combines modern and classic design elements with decorative finials.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three lampshades and the symmetrical arrangement of the curved arms and finials.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shades and the curvature of the arms, with two shades more visible.
description_view_2: Direct view from below, displaying the triangular layout of the shades and the central mounting point.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, emphasizing the third shade and the elegant sweep of the metallic arms.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture features a transitional design blending modern drum shades with classic curved metallic arms and decorative finials. Its clean lines and polished finish give it a sophisticated yet timeless appeal.
